column3: Open or close this keyboard help overlay.
Open or close the command palette.
Move through commands and run focus search, open help, switch tabs, clear search, or toggle theme.
Move through focus order. The active view tab is the only tab stop in the tablist before panel controls.
Select and focus the next or previous view tab, wrapping at the ends.
Close the overlay and return focus to the Help control.
Clear search filters, results, and errors without moving focus.
Clear replay output and return the replay panel to idle.
